ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's jersey */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's jersey */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager (foreign key to the managers table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "contract_expires" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Current market value of the player in a specific currency */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance in a match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "touches" INTEGER /* Total number of touches */,
  "crosses" INTEGER /* Number of crosses */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "fouls_won" INTEGER /* Number of fouls won */,
  "fouls_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of fouls conceded */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "subs_on" INTEGER /* Number of substitutions made (player on) */,
  "subs_off" INTEGER /* Number of substitutions made (player off) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played in the match */,
  "pass_completion_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of passes completed */,
  "dribble_success_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of successful dribbles */,
  "aerial_duels_won" INTEGER /* Number of aerial duels won */,
  "aerial_duels_lost" INTEGER /* Number of aerial duels lost */,
  "yellow_cards_issued" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued to the player */,
  "red_cards_issued" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued to the player */,
  "injury_time" INTEGER /* Time spent off the field due to injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 3-1) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Date when the manager's career started */,
  "career_end" TEXT /* Date when the manager's career ended (if applicable) */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the manager is managing (foreign key to the teams table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
column_names: Primary color of the team's jersey
Secondary color of the team's jersey
